app.title: Interactive Career Profile
app.homeIntro: Ask questions about this career profile, request a meeting, or submit a job description for role-fit analysis.

chat.disclaimer: Conversations are stored to provide continuity. Do not submit sensitive personal data, passwords, or confidential information.
chat.emptyState: Start a conversation by typing a message or choosing a guided prompt below.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask about experience, skills, availability, or request a meeting...
chat.refusedHint: This request could not be fulfilled under the profile policy.
chat.leadMeetingPrompt: I'd like to schedule a meeting. My name is (Your name). Email: you{'@'}example.com. Preferred times: next week mornings.
chat.leadJobPrompt:
I'd like to submit a job description for role-fit analysis.

Job description:
[paste role details here]

Email: you{'@'}example.com
chat.leadFollowUpPrompt:
I have a follow-up question for the profile owner.

Email: you{'@'}example.com
Question: [your question here]

legal.loadError: Unable to load this legal page.
